skillName: Generate linear sequences using term to term rules
misconceptionSummary: Students apply the term-to-term rule inconsistently or stop after one correct step.

steps.narration: A term-to-term rule tells you how to move from one term to the next.
Apply the same rule repeatedly to generate the sequence.
Keep using the same rule each time.

visuals.expression: Start value + repeated rule gives the sequence
visuals.label: Term-to-term rules build the sequence one step at a time

steps.narration: To generate a linear sequence, start with the first term and apply the same add or subtract rule repeatedly.

misconceptionStrip.text: Common mistake: using the rule once and then guessing. The same term-to-term rule must be applied at every step.
misconceptionStrip.audioNarration: Each new term comes from the previous term by the same rule. Keep repeating it carefully.
